title: INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNT - 211info
text: WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Individual Development Accounts (IDAs), a matched savings program that helps community members save money and receive matching funds. Participants attend financial and asset-specific education classes. Funds can be used for home ownership, home repairs, starting a business, education, rent, vehicles, paying off debt, or assistive technology. 1136 Paiute Avenue Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: People who live, work, or have addresses on the Warm Springs Indian Reservation Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 553-3148 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 553-3148 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, and proof of address AREA SERVED: Warm Springs Indian Reservation Services: Individual Development Accounts Individual Development Accounts * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - SMALL BUSINESS SUPPORT EMPLOYMENT - WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT MONEY MANAGEMENT - HUD APPROVED FINANCIAL AND HOMEOWNERSHIP COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM
